english: teacher in charge of a class

etymology.description: 班(班) (bān, "class; team") refers to a group of students taught together. 主任(主任) (zhǔrèn, "director; person in charge") indicates a person who holds responsibility or leads in a specific capacity. In this context, it refers to someone who has the direct responsibility and management of a particular class.
etymology.interpretation: 班(班) (bān, "class") refers to the organized group of students. 主任(主任) (zhǔrèn, "person in charge") implies someone who oversees responsibilities. Thus 班主任 refers to a teacher who not only teaches but is also responsible for administering and supervising the class's overall functioning.

examples.chinese: 我们的班主任每天都很关心我们的学习(我們的班主任每天都很關心我們的學習)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen de bānzhǔrèn měitiān dōu hěn guānxīn wǒmen de xuéxí.
examples.english: Our class teacher is very concerned about our studies every day.

examples.chinese: 班主任组织了一个课外活动(班主任組織了一個課外活動)。
examples.english: The class teacher organized an extracurricular activity.

examples.chinese: 每个新学期开始时(每個新學期開始時)，班主任都会召开班会(班主任都會召開班會)。
examples.pinyin: Měi gè xīn xuéqī kāishǐ shí, bānzhǔrèn dōu huì zhàokāi bānhuì.
examples.english: At the beginning of each new semester, the class teacher holds a class meeting.
